global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a prominent logo and call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to save confidently with a quick signup.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'VaultRun' in bold, modern typography, positioned prominently at the top center.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: An abstract design with a circular and square shape in lighter purple tones, adding visual interest to the background.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label in the top left corner that reads 'UGC' in white text, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small circular element in the bottom left, adding a decorative touch to the overall design.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The text 'Save with confidence' is displayed prominently in white, bold font, with a subtext below it in smaller font.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Fast signup; instant card

elements.label: VaultRun headline
elements.description: The headline 'VaultRun' is in large, bold letters at the top, capturing immediate attention.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button at the bottom center that reads 'Get offer' in white text on a contrasting background, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: UGC tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' in the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.
